manifests.name: Gmail (v0.1 reference example)
manifests.description: Reference v0.1 install manifest for a Gmail tool with OAuth. Useful as a template for the legacy MCP-shaped manifest format; not a production-grade manifest.

manifests.name: Gmail (v0.2 reference example)
manifests.description: Reference v0.2 install manifest for a Gmail tool with OAuth. Demonstrates the structured actions[] catalog with input/output schemas, side-effects classification, and the action-call smoke test kind.

manifests.name: Gmail (v0.3 reference example)
manifests.description: Reference v0.3 install manifest for a Gmail tool with OAuth. Adds the top-level verify section (eval suite + SLA + schedule), the data_boundary section (reads / transmits / persists / retention — required when scopes touch private user data), and per-field-capped actions[].docs. Use this as the template when authoring new manifests.
